message:
feat(web): Enhance OfflineBanner with auto-reset and test ID

This commit improves the OfflineBanner component with two enhancements:

1. Auto-reset dismissed state on connectivity change
   - Added useEffect hook that watches the isOffline prop
   - When connectivity is restored (isOffline becomes false), the
     dismissed state resets to false
   - This allows the banner to reappear if the user goes offline again
     after previously dismissing it, ensuring they're always informed
     of connectivity issues
   - Previously, once dismissed, the banner would never show again
     until page refresh, even if the user went offline multiple times

2. Added data-testid attribute for E2E testing
   - Added data-testid="offline-indicator" to the banner container
   - Enables reliable selection in Playwright/E2E tests without
     depending on class names or text content that may change
   - Follows the project's testing conventions for component identification

Technical details:
- useEffect dependency array includes only [isOffline] for optimal
  re-render behavior
- State reset is conditional (only when !isOffline) to avoid
  unnecessary re-renders when going offline

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
